title: Is the most basic definition of a house synonymous with the components of a house of name?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Like there is no such thing as a union between husband and wife ad infinitum, because a union between husband and wife that doesn't bear fruit is a fruitless Barren marriage. A marriage that is fruitf
body: Like there is no such thing as a union between husband and wife ad infinitum, because a union between husband and wife that doesn't bear fruit is a fruitless Barren marriage. A marriage that is fruitful is a marriage that is successful. The intention of the joining is to produce fruit in other words. The point of marriage is fruit. The point of the Union is the fruit produced by it. So there is no such thing as a consideration of marriage apart from children or the production of that Union the product of that union. If this is so then whenever the house concept replicates and emerges again in a higher cosm then these components would be intact. For instance the father mother children language would just be applied again to larger macrocosmic subcomponents of said space or orbit.
content: Like there is no such thing as a union between husband and wife ad infinitum, because a union between husband and wife that doesn't bear fruit is a fruitless Barren marriage. A marriage that is fruitful is a marriage that is successful. The intention of the joining is to produce fruit in other words. The point of marriage is fruit. The point of the Union is the fruit produced by it. So there is no such thing as a consideration of marriage apart from children or the production of that Union the product of that union. If this is so then whenever the house concept replicates and emerges again in a higher cosm then these components would be intact. For instance the father mother children language would just be applied again to larger macrocosmic subcomponents of said space or orbit.
